title: 360_Bloom linear chain + bloom onset (L4 LEAD)
goal: 360_Bloom 11.58 dB -> LEAD/worst of the S2/S4 linear-chain+colour family. FCP keeps the WHOLE filter+blend chain in kCGColorSpaceLinearSRGB and encodes to sRGB ONCE at readback; the engine encodes per-filter. Infra exists (compositor/linear.ts, flag-gated). A per-filter linear encode is a PROVEN DEAD-END (regresses stacked transitions) - build the WHOLE-CHAIN float pass, encode once, flip ON family-by-family, gate all 65 after each. Bloom-float is decoded + register-verified but its threshold TEMPORAL ONSET over-blooms (FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT ON regresses Lights_Bloom -1.0, 360_Bloom -1.1) - stays OFF until the onset curve is decoded. DoD: linear chain lands family-by-family gate-green; do NOT commit red.
notes: | MEASURED 2026-07-18: the decode-faithful FLOAT bloom (FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT path in glow.ts, now using decimatedBlurFloatRGB) scores Lights__Bloom 18.60->18.89 (+0.29) but 360_Bloom 11.52->10.74 (-0.78) = NET -0.49 on the GUI gate. So the float bloom is still NOT gate-ready: the x10 extract + additive-Brightness/50 combine energy diverges from GT on the LIVE-evaluating 360 host (Lights__Bloom retime-wraps so its bloom barely fires). The FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT flag is a Rule-12 violation (tracked T-qdeflag0001) — but the default-OFF 8-bit path is the gate-correct one until the extract/combine energy is re-decoded to match BOTH Bloom slugs' GUI GT. Blur sub-kernel is already VERIFIED (PAEGaussianBlur). NEXT: re-decode the bloomHeliumRender combine gain/threshold against 360_Bloom GT specifically (it evaluates live, no wrap confound).
